# Oscar Wilde

*1854 – 1900 · Irish*

Irish writer, a figure of aestheticism: he sets beauty and art up as sovereign ends, holds life to be a work to be composed and the artist to be the master of an existence freed from utilitarian morality.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
